title: Mossy Cobblemon
description: Mossy Cobblemon is a modpack surrounding cobblemon for my server! It focuses on Cobblemon obviously! and create mod with a compat for the 2! on top of that there is a lot of vanilla+ features to make the minecraft experience better!
body:
Mossy Cobblemon is a modpack surrounding cobblemon for my server! It focuses on Cobblemon obviously! and create mod with a compat for the 2! on top of that there is a lot of vanilla+ features to make the minecraft experience better!!

Join are Discord to enteract with everyone get updates and ask for help or even request features!
[https://discord.com/invite/5yGSNrudAq](https://discord.com/invite/5yGSNrudAq)
